topPlaces.name: Barshul
topPlaces.description: Barsul is a village in Burdwan II community development block in Bardhaman Sadar North subdivision of Purba Bardhaman district in the state of West Bengal, India.

topPlaces.name: Salimabad, Purba Bardhaman
topPlaces.description: Salimabad is a village in Jamalpur block of Purba Bardhaman district, West Bengal, India. It is located on the east bank of the Damodar river, about 20 miles (32 km) south of the city of Bardhaman.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Sat Deul?
faq.a: The best time to visit Sat Deul is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Sat Deul?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Netaji Subhas Chandra Bose International Airport, Kolkata (69 km) and the nearest railway station is Howrah Junction (Kolkata) (70 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Sat Deul?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Sat Deul at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Sat Deul?
faq.a: Stays in Sat Deul start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Sat Deul?
faq.a: The top attractions are Masagram, Nabagram, Bardhaman, Rasulpur, Bardhaman, Palsit, Barshul.
